headline: Is The Progressive Corporation (PGR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PGR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on The Progressive Corporation on The Fat Pitch’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PGR. The Progressive Corporation’s share was trading at $200.26 as of June 8th. PGR’s trailing and forward P/E were 10.38 and 12.53 respectively according to […]

headline: Progressive Corporation: Exceptional Growth But Normalizing Margins
summary: Progressive Corporation maintains exceptional market-share gains and strong underwriting, but faces near-term EPS declines. See why PGR stock is a buy.
